context_rules.trigger_phrases: Exact phrase must appear in normalized transcript segment
context_rules.required_context: At least ONE of these clinically-specific action words must appear within 10 tokens of the matched phrase. Generic words like 'patient', 'session', 'treatment' are excluded — they fire on everything.
context_rules.exclude_if_present: If any of these appear in the same sentence as the match, suppress the code.

_meta.change_log: v1.0.0: Initial SBS lookup generated from SBS-LLM-Context 2.json (99 codes total), mirroring the structure, match strategy, and trigger-phrase methodology of medexa_cpt_lookup.json. Covers audiology/speech diagnostic tests, physical modalities (thermal, laser, ultrasound, shockwave, phototherapy, stimulation, massage, acupuncture, hydrotherapy, biofeedback), joint manipulation/mobilisation, PT/OT/SLP initial assessments, home-care per-session and bundled codes, allied health intervention codes, SLP diagnostic assessments (swallowing/voice/speech/fluency/language), specialised audiology tests (rollover, filtered speech), voice/speech/fluency/language counselling, body-region exercise therapy codes, cognitive/functional/vocational/sensory skills-training codes, and time-based OT/PT/Speech therapy packages by session duration. v2.0.0: Rewritten for literal therapist-patient conversations. Expanded every code to at least 18 normalized trigger phrases, populated exclusions for all 99 codes, broadened conversational action context, discipline-anchored all time-based package phrases, added audiology/ENT suppression terms, and removed all normalized cross-code trigger collisions. v2.1.0: Removed mechanical template-wrap trigger phrases (prefix-wraps of an already-present literal trigger in the same entry) that added no real detection power given the gap-tolerant matcher and generic-verb context fallback. Added genuinely new patient-perspective trigger phrases (complaints, questions, colloquial references) for assessment, treatment, counselling, and device-fitting codes. Left 83620-* home-visit/bundle codes and 98010-*/98014-*/98016-* time-based package tiers unchanged. Also fixed 4 latent cross-code collisions: 83600-01-50 vs 96012-00-00, 96019-00-00 vs 92001-00-30, 96129-00-00 vs 96128-00-00, and 96142-00-00 vs 96130-00-00 via narrow exclude_if_present additions.
